topic: NLP4PBM: A Systematic Review on Process Extraction using Natural Language Processing with Rule-based, Machine and Deep Learning Methods
topic_definition: NLP4PBM: A Systematic Review on Process Extraction using Natural Language Processing with Rule-based, Machine and Deep Learning Methods

summary_topics.description: NLP4PBM: A Systematic Review on Process Extraction using Natural Language Processing with Rule-based, Machine and Deep Learning Methods

required.criterion: Full research article in a **peer-reviewed conference or journal**.
Primary research (original contribution; not secondary research).
Specifically covers **use of NLP for process extraction from natural language text**.
Describes **experiments** to empirically validate the method.
No publication-year restriction (i.e., do not exclude by year).

exclusion_criteria.criterion: Not a full research paper (poster/short/abstract/report/thesis/book chapter).
Not published in a conference or journal (workshop/discussion forum/white paper/technical report).

Not specifically NLP-for-process-extraction (includes: process redesign/matching/prediction, sentiment analysis, targeting individual labels instead of natural text, generating natural text from processes).
Only superficially discusses an applied method.
Does not describe experiments to validate the method.
